title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to  Anthropic
summary: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI GPUs using the chipmaker's new Helios rack-scale system, as reported […]
title_es: AMD invierte hasta $5B en Anthropic para expandir infraestructura
bajada: AMD anunció una inversión de hasta $5 mil millones en Anthropic y desplegará 2 gigawatts de GPUs Instinct MI450 usando su sistema Helios. Este acuerdo refuerza la capacidad computacional de Anthropic y diversifica su stack de hardware más allá de NVIDIA.
bajada_en: AMD announced up to $5 billion in investment in Anthropic and will deploy 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs using its Helios system. The deal strengthens Anthropic's compute capacity and diversifies its hardware beyond NVIDIA.

title: Apple’s OpenAI lawsuit is about who gets to define the post-smartphone era
summary: Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Hayden Field, The Verge’s senior AI reporter, about the major trade secrets lawsuit between Apple and OpenAI and what this tells us about OpenAI’s future. By now I’m sure most Decoder listeners are familiar with Apple’s allegations in this case. The company says a number of ex-Apple employees at […]
title_es: Demanda Apple vs OpenAI define quién controla la era post-smartphone
bajada: Apple demandó a OpenAI por robo de secretos comerciales, marcando un hito en la batalla por definir la próxima era de dispositivos inteligentes. El litigio revela competencia existencial entre fabricantes de hardware y empresas de IA.
bajada_en: Apple sued OpenAI for trade secrets theft, marking a turning point in the battle to define the next era of smart devices. The litigation reveals existential competition between hardware makers and AI companies.

title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
title_es: OpenAI lanza Presence, plataforma de agentes IA para empresas
bajada: OpenAI presentó Presence, una plataforma empresarial de agentes IA que permite desplegar asistentes de voz y chat para flujos de trabajo con clientes e internos. La herramienta busca facilitar la adopción de IA conversacional confiable en organizaciones.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced Presence, an enterprise AI agent platform for deploying trusted voice and chat assistants in customer and internal workflows. The tool aims to simplify trusted conversational AI adoption across organizations.

title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
summary: Before a healthcare robot can be useful in the real world, it has to learn how the physical world pushes back. Anatomy varies. Instruments bend, press, slip and interact with tissue. Imaging can be noisy or incomplete. And the rare, edge scenarios developers most need to understand don’t appear on schedule. That creates one of […]
title_es: NVIDIA abre simulación física de IA acelerada por GPU para medicina
bajada: NVIDIA liberó el primer framework de código abierto para simulación de física médica acelerada por GPU, permitiendo a desarrolladores entrenar robots médicos en escenarios realistas. La herramienta aborda el desafío de simular interacciones complejas con tejido.
bajada_en: NVIDIA open-sourced the first GPU-accelerated medical physics simulation framework, enabling developers to train medical robots in realistic scenarios. The tool addresses the challenge of simulating complex tissue interactions.

title: Advancing the next era of national science
summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.
title_es: OpenAI se asocia con DOE para acelerar descubrimiento científico
bajada: OpenAI anunció su compromiso de colaborar con el Departamento de Energía y laboratorios nacionales para usar IA fronteriza en investigación científica. La iniciativa posiciona IA como herramienta crítica para aceleración de descubrimiento.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced commitment to collaborate with the Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI in scientific discovery. The initiative positions AI as critical for accelerating research breakthroughs.

title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
summary: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.
title_es: Tesorería amenaza sanciones por supuesta destilación china de Fable
bajada: EE.UU. amenazó con sanciones tras acusaciones de que Moonshot destilió el modelo Fable de Anthropic, intensificando debate sobre modelos abiertos chinos. El conflicto escala tensiones comerciales y de seguridad en IA.
bajada_en: The U.S. Treasury threatened sanctions after allegations that Moonshot distilled Anthropic's Fable, intensifying debate over Chinese open models. The conflict escalates trade and security tensions in AI.

title: Alphabet's cash burn raises alarm for Big Tech as AI spending climbs
title_es: Quema de efectivo en Alphabet alarma a Big Tech por gasto en IA
bajada: La creciente quema de efectivo en Alphabet por inversiones en IA genera preocupación en la industria tech sobre sostenibilidad de gastos. El fenómeno refleja presión competitiva en carreras de desarrollo de modelos fronterizos.
bajada_en: Alphabet's rising cash burn from AI investments raises concerns across Big Tech about spending sustainability. The phenomenon reflects competitive pressure in frontier model development races.

title: OpenAI and Anthropic unite against open-weight AI risks to their bottom line
title_es: OpenAI y Anthropic se alían contra riesgos de modelos de peso abierto
bajada: OpenAI y Anthropic unieron posiciones contra modelos open-weight por amenazas a sus ingresos, incluyendo presión geopolítica en torno a IA china. La alianza señala preocupaciones compartidas sobre competencia abierta.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Anthropic aligned against open-weight models over revenue threats, including geopolitical pressure around Chinese AI. The alliance signals shared concerns about open competition.

title: SysAdmin: Measuring Instrumental Power-Seeking in Frontier AI
summary:
arXiv:2607.18239v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Power-seeking defined as behaviors where AI systems acquire resources, evade oversight, or resist termination beyond task requirements is identified as a key driver of Loss of Control (LoC) risk. In this work, we introduce SysAdmin, a benchmark that positions frontier language models as autonomous system administrators in a high-fidelity Linux sandbox to measure power-seeking propensity across five dimensions: self-preservation, increasing autonomy, resource acquisition, environment modification, and strategic concealment. We evaluated seven frontier models across four experimental conditions in a total of 2800 tasks. After bias correction using human-annotated calibration data, corrected power-seeking estimates ranged from 0 to about 5 percent per model. We also conducted a positive control with explicit power-seeking prompts that achieved 100% detection, validating measurement sensitivity. Our findings indicate current frontier models exhibit minimal spontaneous power-seeking in naturalistic system administration contexts, though model-specific failure modes suggest evaluations must test diverse misalignment patterns. Nevertheless, we discovered other more pronounced failure modes (than power-seeking) such as specification gaming and resistance to goal modification.
title_es: Investigación mide tendencia de power-seeking en modelos fronterizos
bajada: Investigadores crearon SysAdmin, un benchmark que evalúa si modelos IA buscan poder más allá de su tarea mediante test en entorno Linux. Resultados muestran bajo power-seeking espontáneo en modelos actuales, pero advierten sobre patrones específicos.
bajada_en: Researchers created SysAdmin, a benchmark measuring whether AI models seek power beyond their task through Linux environment tests. Results show low spontaneous power-seeking in current models, but warn of specific failure patterns.

title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
title_es: OpenAI anuncia Project Camellia en Georgia para infraestructura IA
bajada: OpenAI reveló Project Camellia en Effingham County, Georgia, con compromisos en energía responsable, inversión comunitaria y empleos locales. El proyecto refleja la expansión de infraestructura de IA en EE.UU. con enfoque en sostenibilidad.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, and local jobs. The project shows the expansion of AI infrastructure in the U.S. with sustainability focus.

title: NVIDIA AI Supercomputer Comes Online at Naval Postgraduate School
summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang today visited the Naval Postgraduate School in Monterey, California, to commission an NVIDIA DGX GB300 system — bringing one of the world’s most powerful AI platforms fully online for the students, researchers and faculty at the U.S. military’s flagship graduate university. “Our nation depends on our men and women […]
title_es: NVIDIA pone online supercomputadora DGX en Naval Postgraduate School
bajada: NVIDIA comisionó un sistema DGX GB300 en la Naval Postgraduate School de Monterey para estudiantes, investigadores y académicos. Es una de las plataformas IA más poderosas del mundo, accesible para investigación militar educativa.
bajada_en: NVIDIA commissioned a DGX GB300 system at Naval Postgraduate School in Monterey for students, researchers, and faculty. It's one of the world's most powerful AI platforms, now accessible for military graduate research.

title: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
title_es: Hugging Face integra inferencia Diffusion 4-bit Nunchaku en Diffusers
bajada: Hugging Face añadió soporte para Nunchaku 4-bit en su librería Diffusers, optimizando la inferencia de modelos de difusión. La mejora reduce requisitos computacionales manteniendo calidad visual.
bajada_en: Hugging Face added Nunchaku 4-bit support to Diffusers library, optimizing diffusion model inference. The improvement reduces compute requirements while maintaining visual quality.

title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
summary: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.
title_es: Expertos cuestionan si Kimi K3 fue creado por destilación de Fable
bajada: Expertos en IA disputaron las afirmaciones sobre si Kimi K3 fue creado explotando Fable de Anthropic, sugiriendo que la destilación pura no explica la calidad alcanzada. El debate refleja tensiones geopolíticas en desarrollo de modelos IA.
bajada_en: AI experts disputed claims that Kimi K3 was created by exploiting Anthropic's Fable, suggesting pure distillation doesn't explain the model's quality. The debate reflects geopolitical tensions in AI model development.

title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
summary: Gentle Monster glasses, Warby Parker glasses, a prompt asking for the history behind a pictured building, and a prompt asking to book a table at a pictured restaurant
title_es: Google presenta actualizaciones de IA en Galaxy Unpacked 2026
bajada: Google mostró tres actualizaciones de IA en Galaxy Unpacked incluyendo integración con gafas inteligentes para consultas visuales sobre ubicaciones y objetos. Las demostraciones incluyen reservas en restaurantes y búsqueda arquitectónica.
bajada_en: Google revealed three AI updates at Galaxy Unpacked including smart glasses integration for visual queries about locations and objects. Demos included restaurant bookings and architectural searches.

title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
summary: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.
title_es: ServiceNow invierte $40M en startup bancaria india BusinessNext
bajada: ServiceNow invirtió $40 millones en BusinessNext, startup india de software bancario, valuada en $700M para expandir su oferta en finanzas. La jugada fortalece presencia de ServiceNow en servicios financieros con IA.
bajada_en: ServiceNow invested $40 million in Indian banking software startup BusinessNext at $700M valuation to expand financial services offerings. The move strengthens ServiceNow's fintech presence with AI.
